source_jobs.description: <p></p><p><b>Who we are</b></p><p></p><p>DoubleVerify is a leading software platform for digital media measurement, data and analytics. DV’s mission is to be the definitive source of transparency and data-driven insights into the quality and effectiveness of digital advertising for the world’s largest brands, publishers and digital ad platforms. DV’s technology platform provides advertisers with consistent and unbiased data and analytics that can be used to optimize the quality and return on their digital ad investments. Since 2008, DV has helped hundreds of Fortune 500 companies gain the most from their media spend by delivering best in class solutions across the digital advertising ecosystem, helping to build a better industry. Learn more at <a href="https://www.doubleverify.com" target="_blank">www.doubleverify.com</a>.</p><p></p><p><b>What you’ll do&nbsp;</b></p><p></p><p>DV is looking for a creative Data Analyst to join the Marketing Insights team. In this role you will support data-driven marketing and thought leadership initiatives that strengthen DoubleVerify’s position as the market leader in ad verification technology.</p><p>Responsibilities include leveraging DV’s first-party data to:</p><ul><li>Create and present findings, insights, and trends biweekly to internal stakeholders</li><li>Maintain data source integrity with regular updates and backups</li><li>Create new data sources and update dashboards as products are released for early access/general market</li><li>Maintain references &amp; directories for public-facing stats, collateral, etc.</li><li>Work cross-functionally with other teams to curate data-based narratives for new and existing products</li><li>Respond to ad hoc data and insight requests from internal stakeholders</li></ul><p></p><p><b>Who You Are</b></p><ul><li>Familiarity with relational databases; strong ability to write and edit queries using SQL and/or other database programming languages</li><li>Experience managing data and visualizations with Looker, Tableau, Data Studio, or other business intelligence application</li><li>Minimum 1-2 years of experience in an analytical capacity (data &amp; analytics, business analytics, or insights preferred)</li><li>Minimum 1-2 years of experience in the digital media/marketing or ad tech space</li><li>Ability to effectively communicate insights to different audiences with varying levels of technical expertise, and ability to jump between in-depth detailed analyses and connecting them to the bigger picture</li><li>Curious, self-starter and an analytical mind - not afraid to ask questions</li><li>Experience finding interesting, actionable insights within vast data sets to tell a story</li><li>Big data doesn’t scare you - skilled in managing complex data from multiple sources and have an understanding of ETL process</li><li>Passionate about data architecture, engineering, and visualization</li></ul><p></p><p>Preferred Qualifications</p><ul><li>Experience working in Python in an analytics capacity</li><li>Digital agency or ad tech experience</li><li>College coursework in business analytics, statistics, information technology, computer science, business and/or marketing</li></ul><p></p><p>The successful candidate’s starting salary will be determined based on a number of non-discriminating factors, including qualifications for the role, level, skills, experience, location, and balancing internal equity relative to peers at DV. The estimated salary range for this role
